allowed_work: Check AusweisApp localhost status reachability as metadata only.
Prepare purpose-bound eID session evidence without PIN, CAN, PUK, card raw data or identity attribute capture.
Hash tcTokenURL values in evidence instead of storing full session URLs.
Define minimal verified-claim sets and consent evidence for downstream IDaaS use.
Route productive identity attributes through an approved eID server, eID service or identification service.
prohibited_work: Store PIN, CAN, PUK, card raw data, card serial values, full identity-document dumps, access tokens, session cookies, certificates or private keys in Git.
Claim that local Codex or AusweisApp SDK access directly returns identity attributes to the client application.
Execute production eID flows without reviewed backend connector code and human approval.
Upload real identity data or client personal data to an LLM without an explicit approved data-processing basis.
Reuse verified claims outside the documented purpose.
day0: Confirm purpose, tenant, actor role, reviewer role, claim-set minimization and privacy basis.
Confirm AusweisApp installation and localhost status reachability.
Confirm Online-Ausweisfunktion, six-digit PIN availability and reader path with the human holder without requesting PIN values.
Confirm backend route: identification service, eID service or own eID server with Berechtigungszertifikat where required.
day1: Run scripts/prepare_eid_session.py to produce metadata-only evidence.
Start production eID only after documented approval and reviewed backend route.
Import only minimal approved backend claims into the downstream IDaaS contract.
day2: Review AusweisApp version drift, eID service contract status, Berechtigungszertifikat status, claim-set minimization, failed sessions, expired assertions and retention drift.
required_accounts_or_approvals: Approved data-processing basis for personal data
Approved eID server, eID service or identification service
Berechtigungszertifikat decision where no identification service is used
Human approval for production eID transaction
Reviewer approval for backend assertion import
AVV/DPA decision for SaaS identification services
